name: buck
description: Exposes Buck's analysis, batch, RL lab, visualizer and prediction-accuracy operations as MCP tools for Claude Desktop.
long_description: Buck is an AI-powered stock analysis and prediction toolkit. This extension wires Buck's MCP server into Claude Desktop so Claude can run single/batch analysis, train and query RL models, generate visualizations, and inspect live prediction accuracy. Bring your own Python environment (the repo's .venv) — point the two settings at your interpreter and checkout.

python_path.title: Python interpreter
python_path.description: Absolute path to the Python that has Buck's dependencies installed. After running install_mcp.sh this is <Buck_V1>/.venv/bin/python

buck_dir.title: Buck repo directory
buck_dir.description: Absolute path to your Buck_V1 checkout (the folder containing mcp_server/ and .env)
